title: JUSTOYOU Hydrangea Flowers Artificial,4 PCS Double Colour Single Long Stem Realistic Hydrangea Flowers, 19.6Inch Large Real Touch Fake Hydrangea Bouquets for Wedding Home Party(blue and deep blue)
features: Hydrangea Flowers Size:Our artificial hydrangea has a single flower length of approximately 19.6in/50cm and a head diameter of approximately 20cm. Using high-quality flower stems, the degree of curvature can be adjusted freely. The entire single hydrangea looks very realistic, with bright colors

Unique creativity: JUSTOYOU hydrangeas use unique production techniques that make the flowers look very realistic. The touch of the flower head feels lifelike, and the flower heads are all colored and textured. The stem also has lateral buds as shown in the picture, making the overall appearance very natural

Widely used: Fake hydrangeas are suitable for many places. For example, wedding decorations, parties, gardens, churches, shops, hotels, and many other public places. It is also an excellent choice for home indoor and outdoor decoration

Rich selection: Our store offers a variety of hydrangea varieties to choose from, including 4pcs of two-color hydrangeas, 3pcs of solid color hydrangeas, and two different leaf shaped hydrangea single flowers. I believe there will always be one that will satisfy you

Durable and reusable: The flower heads, leaves, and stems are made of high-quality materials and exquisite craftsmanship, which eliminates the need for you to spend a lot of time tending to the flowers or watering them. The color is bright all year round and will not fade. If you find signs of pressure on the leaves after receiving the goods, you can use a hair dryer to heat the leaves back to normal
